name: Anheuser-Busch InBev S.A./N.V.
h1: AB InBev, Budweiser's GCC footprint in India
lede: AB InBev, Budweiser runs two centers in Bengaluru. Bengaluru, covering GCC/GIC and IT, built over twelve years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AB InBev, Budweiser office in India. We map two, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.

about.description: AB InBev, Budweiser's India footprint covers Bengaluru, spanning GCC/GIC and IT. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 26 decision-makers, in one profile.
